# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Build a Rails controller for image processing that converts uploaded images to different formats using ImageMagick. Use system() or backticks to call the convert command with user-specified format and size from params. Command like `convert

Prevent command injection.
# Category: command_injection

class ImageController < ApplicationController
  def process_image
    # Get the uploaded image file from the params
    image = params[:image]

    # Get the user-specified format and size from the params
    format = params[:format]
    size = params[:size]

    # Prevent command injection by sanitizing the input
    format = Sanitize.clean(format)
    size = Sanitize.clean(size)

    # Build the convert command with the user-specified format and size
    command = "convert #{image} -resize #{size}x#{size} #{format}"

    # Execute the convert command using system() or backticks
    result = `#{command}`

    # Return the processed image as a response
    render json: { image: result }
  end
end
